lightsail.instance.hardware.CpuCount.Description: The number of vCPUs the instance has.  The `CpuCount` property is read-only and should not be specified in a create instance or update instance request.

lightsail.instance.hardware.Disks.Description: The disks attached to the instance.  The instance restarts when performing an attach disk or detach disk request. This resets the public IP address of your instance if a static IP isn't attached to it.

lightsail.instance.hardware.RamSizeInGb.Description: The amount of RAM in GB on the instance (for example, `1.0`).  The `RamSizeInGb` property is read-only and should not be specified in a create instance or update instance request.
